business.title: Tree Crops Development Authority says media reports on rubber exports are misleading, demands apology
business.description: The Tree Crops Development Authority (TCDA) has rejected recent media reports alleging under-invoicing in Ghana’s raw rubber exports, describing the publications as misleading, unverified, and “paid propaganda.” In a formal response, the Authority said the reports were not based on credible data and failed to consult the statutory regulator of the tree crops sector. “The media house did not seek our input before publishing, despite TCDA being the mandated regulator. This points to a predetermined narrative rather than a genuine investigation,” the Authority stated.
